Ai-L tliDLi (10i r'fi'rt, rtili'I-Ii{'ili!a"il n,I}tI{]A'tItl}N irO r i.ilt .clloi\ N c r v D c l l d . t h e l 9 t h A p n i . 2 C C - i Regulrtionsfor Creation of National Engircers Regtstrationand Licencing Bcaril (NERLB) No. F. QA/ENGP.S-REGN/051/2002.-ln exerciseof the porversconferredundcr clause(r) and (r') of Sectionl0 of theAICTE Act, 1987(52 of 1987)readruth Section23 ( I ) of the Act, the AICTE herebi'm.rliesthesc regulations,u'ith ilre approl'alt-rfilre N{IJRD,Gor,cnurrcrrtcf lndia for Creationof 'Nationai Eugncers Registratron and LicensrngBoard' TNERLB) P R E A I I I B L E : The professionsof medicineand surgery,phartnacy,architectureand larv. in lndia, are all regulatedby larv for effective functioning. With the increasing globalizationand competitiveness, framingof appropriateregulationsin the field of Engineeringprofessionhas h e c o m ei m n e r a t i v co n a c c o u n to f c h : ! l e n g e s , ' . ' . ' h i c h t h e I n d i a n e n g i n e e r s " " ' i l l h a " c l o encounterglobally in the near future. In the Nationalcontext also, such a step rvouldbe r:sefulto ensurequality,efficiencyandtransparency in engineeringprofession. AICTE has alrelrdy undertakenrvith the responsibilityof accreditationof cngineering educationalprogranrstluough National Board of Accreditatiott(NBA) Registrationand Licensingis a logicalextensionof the tasksalreadybeirtgcarriedout by the AICTE. I OBJECTIVES: l. The principalobjectto createNITRLBis for providingregistrationto the Enginecring graduates from the recognizedinstitutionsattdto issuelicensesfor the practiceof profession to thedesiringengineersin Indiawith a viervto etrltance the level of proficiencyandethicsin the practiceof Engineeringprofessionin the country. 2. h-orthe purposeof carrying out the aboveobject,the council will establishNational Engineers'Registrationand LicensingBoard(NERLB) in order to streamlinetlte processof the registrationof engineers/ professionalengineersand relatedlnatters. PRINCIPLB FUNCTIONS OF NERLB : NERLB shallcarry out the follorvingactivitiesin furtheranceof the aboveobject : 1 .
